entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: The crop species Pennisetum glaucum targeted for genetic diversification.

entities.name: DIALLEL CROSSES
entities.description: A systematic breeding approach used to create crosses between a set of genotypes to diversify germplasm.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of initiating systematic variety within elite regional germplasms.

entities.name: ELITE REGIONAL GERMPLASMS
entities.description: High-quality genetic materials from various regions used as parents in the breeding process.

entities.name: GLOBAL PEARL MILLET DIALLEL PROJECT
entities.description: A project developed to initiate systematic diversification of pearl millet through trait-based global diallel crosses.
